welcome:
Hello! Welcome to PokeScout!
I'll help you find deals on Pokémon cards and sealed products on eBay.
onboarding_browse:
*Welcome to PokeScout!*

The easiest way to get started:

/browse — explore single cards by series and set
/sealed — browse ETBs and booster boxes

Tap *Alert me* on any product and I'll notify you the moment a deal appears on eBay below your price!

Useful commands:
/browse – Single cards
/sealed – Sealed products
/preferences – Manage alerts
/status – Subscription status
/help – Help
choose_categories: What are you looking for? Pick categories (multiple allowed):
enter_product_search: Search for a specific product (card name, ETB, booster box, ...) or press /skip:
product_not_found: No matching products found. Try a different name, or press /skip.
choose_preset: Pick a quick preset, or configure manually:
preset_selected: {name} selected! Now set your max price or press /skip:
enter_keywords:
Enter search keywords (comma-separated), or press /skip:
Example: charizard, etb, 151
enter_price_min: Enter minimum price ($), or 0 for no limit:
enter_price_max: Enter maximum price ($), or 0 for no limit:
preference_saved:
Preference "{name}" saved!
Now scanning eBay for deals. {free_left} free alerts remaining.
enter_preference_name: Give this preference a name (e.g. "Charizard ex SIR" or "SV 151 ETB"):
already_subscribed: You already have an active subscription until {expires}.
no_preferences: You have no active preferences. Use /add to create one.
preference_limit_reached: You've reached the {limit}-alert limit on your current plan. {upgrade_hint}
preference_limit_upgrade_hint: Subscribe for up to 50 alerts at $9.99/month: /subscribe
preference_limit_pro_hint: You're on Pro with 50 alerts. Delete an existing alert via /preferences to add a new one.
preference_duplicate: You already have an alert called "{name}" that monitors the same thing. Use /preferences to view or edit it.
auction_threshold_note: ℹ️ For auctions, you'll be alerted when the ending time is within 1 hour and the current bid is below your target price.
preference_empty_keywords_warning: ⚠️ No keywords set — this alert will match *every* listing in the selected categories and use up your free alerts quickly. Add keywords to narrow it down, or continue anyway.
preference_edit_menu:
Editing: *{name}*

What would you like to change?
help_text:
*PokeScout — Help*

/browse – Browse single cards by series and set
/sealed – Browse ETBs and booster boxes
/preferences – View and edit preferences
/status – View subscription status
/subscribe – Upgrade to paid plan
/help – Show this help
admin_only: This command is only available to admins.
add_search_prompt:
What are you looking for?

Type a card or product name:
add_no_results:
No exact matches for "{query}".

I can still alert you when eBay listings mentioning "{query}" appear:
setup_confirmed: ✅ {count} alert(s) created! Use /preferences to manage them.
error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
